feature_definitions.directional_taker_imbalance: side * (2 * sum(taker_buy_base) / sum(volume) - 1) over completed confirmation bars
feature_definitions.confirmation_relative_volume: mean confirmation-bar volume divided by median volume of the 60 completed one-minute bars strictly before the H1 decision
feature_definitions.confirmation_clv: directional location of the final confirmation close within the aggregate confirmation high-low range
feature_definitions.outside: strictly beyond the frozen N20 external level in trade direction

candidate_selection.score: minimum of development and validation lower-confidence mean net R, where LCB = mean(net_r) - 2 * sample_std(net_r) / sqrt(n)
candidate_selection.baseline: the frozen N20_QUALITY_TIER_EXIT_V1 five-minute execution ledger is always reported and cannot be displaced unless the one-minute challenger passes every pre-2024 gate

portfolio.same_timestamp_priority: the frozen causal N20 quality priority used by the current shared runtime

execution.funding: only settlements strictly after entry and strictly before exit
execution.data_gap: censor or reject any episode that is not minute-contiguous

promotion: historical success is research-only; the first genuinely unobserved evidence begins after the frozen specification and requires prospective shadow execution
